text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "Repeated connections to the LSASS named pipe (\\lsass), which is a common technique used by attackers for credential access, combined with loading network and domain-related DLLs (netapi32.dll, srvcli.dll, logoncli.dll, netutils.dll, dsrole.dll). While wmiprvse.exe is a legitimate process, this specific pattern of activity is highly suspicious.",
  "indicators": [
    "wmiprvse.exe",
    "pipe_connect",
    "lsass",
    "credential access",
    "netapi32.dll",
    "logoncli.dll",
    "srvcli.dll",
    "dsrole.dll"
  ]
}
